requirements.title: Vehicle Perception System Safety
requirements.description: The vehicle perception system shall detect and classify obstacles with 99.5% accuracy under all specified operating conditions.
requirements.rationale: Critical safety function for autonomous driving

requirements.title: Sensor Redundancy
requirements.description: The hardware shall provide redundant sensor inputs (camera + LiDAR) for obstacle detection.

requirements.title: Camera Subsystem
requirements.description: Camera subsystem shall provide 30fps image stream at minimum 720p resolution.

requirements.title: LiDAR Subsystem
requirements.description: LiDAR subsystem shall provide point cloud data at 10Hz with 100m range.

requirements.title: Object Detection Model
requirements.description: The object detection model shall achieve mAP >= 0.85 on the validation dataset.

requirements.title: Model Input Validation
requirements.description: The model shall validate input dimensions and reject invalid inputs safely.

requirements.title: Model Inference Timeout
requirements.description: Model inference shall complete within 100ms or return safe default.

requirements.title: Drift Detection
requirements.description: The system shall detect data drift and alert operators within 5 minutes.

requirements.title: PSI Drift Detection
requirements.description: Population Stability Index shall be computed for all input features.

requirements.title: Drift Alert Threshold
requirements.description: Drift alerts shall be triggered when ensemble score exceeds 0.3.
